data.name: Intro
data.value: Information pursuant to Section 5 of the German Digital Services Act (Digitale-Dienste-Gesetz, DDG).

data.name: ResponsibleText
data.value: The person responsible for the content of this website is

data.name: DisputeText
data.value: The service provider is neither willing nor obliged to participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board, unless a mandatory statutory obligation applies.

data.name: LiabilityOwnContent
data.value: The content on this website has been prepared with reasonable care. As a service provider, the provider is responsible for its own content in accordance with the general laws.

data.name: LiabilityLinks
data.value: This website may contain links to external third-party websites. The provider has no influence on their current or future content. Linked pages are reviewed for obvious legal violations when the link is created. If legal violations become known, such links will be removed promptly.

data.name: CopyrightText
data.value: The content and works created by the provider on this website are subject to German copyright law. Reproduction, editing, distribution or any use beyond the limits of copyright law requires prior consent, unless the use is expressly permitted by law.

data.name: PrivacyText
data.value: This legal notice does not replace the privacy policy. Information on the processing of personal data is provided in the privacy policy of this website.
